reviews.comment:
Quiero agradecer a todo el personal: los que me atendieron el teléfono y las chicas del mini shop que fueron muy amables en el día de hoy (18/1/22) al cuidar mi mochila y devolvérmela con todas sus pertenencias. Gracias !!!! ( ademas comimos unas hamburguesas excelentes !)

(Translated by Google)
I want to thank all the staff: those who answered the phone and the girls at the mini-shop who were so kind today (January 18, 2022) in looking after my backpack and returning it to me with all my belongings. Thank you!!!! (We also had some excellent hamburgers!)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteElyTTFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
lamentablemente cargamos Gasoil ahi. y era pura?agua.😢. el camino a la pampa fallo la H1. mini van. fue una lastima. xq de ahi ya fue otra cosa. el Sam luis tuvimos q cambiar flltro de gasoil filtro dr aire, y poner limpia inyectores. ahi mejoro. pero x prevencion al taller oficial.cq esa estacion quizo ganar poniendo agua.😢😢😢😢

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, we filled up with diesel there, and it was pure water. 😢 The H1 minivan broke down on the way to La Pampa. It was a shame because after that, it was a different story. We had to change the diesel filter and air filter on the Sam Louis, and add fuel injector cleaner. It improved after that, but as a precaution, we took it back to the official workshop because that station tried to make money by putting in water. 😢😢😢😢

reviews.comment:
Pesimo servicio, tanto en la playa de carga como en el.autoservice. No hacen factura. Y si la hacen te cobran el iva aparte? Cualquiera

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, both at the loading area and the drive-thru. They don't issue invoices. And if they do, they charge you VAT separately? Unbelievable.
